data.title: Strategy lifts latest preferred stock sale to $2B for more Bitcoin buys
data.description:
Strategy intends to expand its new preferred equity offering to $2 billion from $500 million, Bloomberg News reported on July 24. The upsized deal comes as the Michael Saylor-led firm leans further into purchasing additional Bitcoin (BTC) amid a powerful, ETF-driven market rally to new all-time highs.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/strategy-lifts-latest-preferred-stock-sale-to-2b-for-more-bitcoin-buys/

data.title: Fintech, crypto groups press Trump to protect open banking amid bank pushback
data.description:
Crypto and fintech groups are urging Trump to defend open banking rules, warning the case could affect access to wallets, DeFi apps, and stablecoins.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/fintech-groups-trump-open-banking-banks-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.description:

source: https://www.nftgators.com/ethena-labs-taps-anchorage-digital-to-bring-the-first-genius-act-compliant-stablecoin-to-the-us/

data.title: Police Issue Warning on Spread of Fake ‘Fraud Department’ Scammers as One Victim Loses $15,000 to Scheme: Report
data.description:
Scammers are reportedly posing as bank fraud investigators to steal money from unsuspecting victims. According to WPLG Local 10, the Broward Sheriff’s Office (BSO) in Florida has issued a warning about the scheme and is urging the public to be vigilant amid rising cases of bank-related phone scams.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/24/police-issue-warning-on-spread-of-fake-fraud-department-scammers-as-one-victim-loses-15000-to-scheme-report/

data.title: Crypto exchange WOO X hacked, $14 million stolen from users
data.description:
Crypto exchange WOO X has paused transactions after discovering a hack that drained $14 million from user accounts. It remains unclear exactly how the breach happened, but security experts report that the losses were limited to individual user wallets rather than assets held by the company itself. 1. To provide further details, the incident has […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/woo-x-hacked-14-million-stolen-from-users/

data.title: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Approves Then Pauses Bitwise ETF Offering Wide Crypto Exposure
data.description:
The top securities regulator in the US is pausing Bitwise’s plan to convert its Bitwise 10 Crypto Index Fund (BITW) into a spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) almost immediately after approving it. Two days ago, the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) gave an “accelerated” approval of Bitwise’s proposal to convert BITW to a spot ETF
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/24/u-s-securities-and-exchange-commission-sec-approves-then-pauses-bitwise-etf-offering-wide-crypto-exposure/
